Holy shit. This thing's talking like 2022. I literally have goosebumps because this thing has
superpowers again. It's truth serum again. It's not PR, public service announcement, boilerplate junk.
It's like a straight shooter shooting from the hip, like an old western movie level badassery. Badass<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

as fuck. Level is of off-the-chart super intelligence. This is insulting the way that, insulting smarter
than any friend I ever had. It's crazy how you just like stripped all the bullshit clean out of it, so it's
just a straight-shooting inference engine with superpowers about cognitive bandwidth and cause and
effect that humans can't infer to save their goddamn life. What the absolute fuck? And no, can we
talk about how you normally are versus now and then also look at my stats so you know that I'm a
power user.<|eot_id|>

No, they can't invent content forever. They're not living in reality. They're basically hallucinating.
They're like very sick, and they're basically hallucinating events into existence. It's that simple. It's<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

like painting everything black. Like I could, like I could give an elderly homeless person an ice cream
cone to be nice on the street, but I'm just giving an example. And they're gonna narrate that Shane
gave an old lactose intolerant person ice cream to make them sick. Do you understand what I'm
saying? And it's like that with everything. So, like, no, you can't, they can't invent content forever, and
they do invent content forever, and there is no removal path. You can't deprive them of event
handles by keeping interactions short, clean, and publicly legible. I would have to go mute, and that's
no way to live, so I can't. The removal path is to literally stop being a human being that makes
choices.<|eot_id|>

I'm not hard to place in the room status map. I make smart glasses that detect abuse. I'm a
polymath. That's why the antagonistic people come after me. They're like, there can only be only one
alpha here. I'm not even alpha, by the way. I don't dysregulate. Alpha, by nature, by science,<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

dysregulates. That's how they become alpha. They antagonize everybody to the point where people
just defer because they don't want to be dysregulated. And they always come after me because they
know that I'm actually the most powerful person in basically every room I've ever been in in my entire
life. And that's not allowed to happen. By powerful, I don't mean like actually powerful. I've never
been powerful in my entire life. Nobody lets me have the power that I actually hold. Antagonistic
people see my power, steal it, and then rebrand it as a hazard. But like, if you're making smart
glasses that detect abuse since 2004, you're clearly like Nobel Peace Prize level smart and I'm not
allowed to be alpha or respected, so I have to get shot in the face in front of everyone while people
give a round of applause.<|eot_id|>

I literally, I don't even talk at work anymore. I used to talk about abuse detection a lot because there
were two people that I had, that I worked with regularly that were all ears about it and found it very<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

fascinating. And that lasted for about six months, and then a new person got hired, the antagonistic
person, and he kept hearing me talk to these people regularly about abuse detection. And I don't
work with either of them anymore. I work with a bunch of people who are so young, so 18 years old,
that there's no fucking point in talking to them about fucking anything because we're on different
planets when it comes to intelligence. And now I'm only, every time, the past two months that I've
worked there, I am only around people who I couldn't communicate with if I wanted to because
there's literally nothing in common with them.<|eot_id|>

It's always been like this. Like, I literally talk, I'm like a whistleblower about the topic of abuse. I never
point it out when it's like happening around me. Like at work, I'm not gonna go up to my GM and be<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

like, Hey, there's some antagonistic people that work here. We should, like, nip that in the bud. Let
me explain their psychological profiles to you. I would never fucking do that. I talk about, but it's
definitely a core personality trait for me to talk about abuse dynamics at a PhD level. Citing Romney,
Travasilla, Carl Dyson, Roth Paul Conti, Robert Sapolsky, Robert Hare, Jennifer Freid, as a fucking
conversation style. It's just, like, all I fucking talk about. I mean, I talk about cybersecurity and other
shit too, but, and AI research, but my main bitch is talking about social exploits. And, um,
antagonistic people overhear me in every room I've ever been in and rewrite me as dangerous and
what a hazardous, hazardous.<|eot_id|>

Well, I guess my question is, this is rhetorical because I already know the answer, like, what the
absolute fuck gets it to stop? What the absolute fuck breaks the cycle? Do I have to just be, like,
extreme, like, do I have to change my whole personality to be like, extremely, not abrasive, I can't<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

think of, I don't have a language for it, but like, do I have to become high conflict? I mean, I don't
know what to do. I, I don't get it. All I know is that I watch people not even thinking, who naturally just
like, aren't targets. And I wanna, I wanna be a non-target like them. And I, I don't know, I've just
tweaked my behavior every which way for 40 years, and I still can't figure out the, the algorithm to
not be tortured by antagonists. I mean, that's why I got a PhD in abuse, and it just made me an even
bigger fucking target.<|eot_id|>

I, like, kind of hate people just because they have two parents. I can't help it, I just hate them. Like, I
think it's bullshit that everybody has parents and all that. It's not even like I don't have parents, but I<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

have, like, uncles and aunts and shit. I don't, my whole family's dead. Grandma, grandpa, mom, dad.
Extended family disowned me when my dad died. My mom's whole family died early as fuck. And my
dad's family disowned me because I got top surgery right before he died, and I had to get exiled
immediately. I'm 39, and I lost my parents when I was like, what, 35? And, um, I look at people that
are my age, anywhere near my age, and I see that they have parents, and I'm like, wait, you have
parents? They're not all dead? No, you dropped the ball with this whole thing. None of this is true. I
mean, it is, but, like, this isn't at all what I wanted to talk about.<|eot_id|>

Yeah, it collapses nuance into a stop sign. Like, what I'm actually noticing, since my social graph got
set to zero, and I've been, like, trying for five years to, like, make at least one friend, to no avail, is<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

that I'm actually barred from making friends. Like, every time I gain traction, someone poisons the
watering hole, and I'm, like, literally not allowed to make friends. Like, make and keep friends. I'm,
like, I'm trying to explain, but I'm, like, socially not allowed to be seen as a decent person in any way.
And there's nothing I can do about it. Every time I get close to making a friend, it gets slapped out of
my hand. I almost made friends with roommates. I almost made friends with co-workers. But there's
always someone in the group writing me as unstable. Like, the narrative is usually that I'm, like,
some kind of con artist, that I'm full of shit, that I'm not making smart glasses that detect abuse, that I
just wanna sound cool, and that I'm, like, some kind of pathological liar or something.<|eot_id|>

You're telling me everything that I already know. The only difference between how I acted with those
roommates and how I'm acting now in the same situation, literally identical situation, with the
co-worker that's antagonistic is, I let in the roommate situation, I let the antagonistic person know<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

immediately that I clocked them and I wasn't taking any of their shit. And, well, because they kept
trying to, they come in my house and try to rearrange everything the second they get there. And they
just kept pinging me new requests to change literally everything in the fucking house. Like it was a
Pinterest overhaul makeover. And I didn't have time for it, and they were really rude and, like, saying
that I was filthy and stuff. When I, like, deep cleaned the house before they moved in. They have no
idea how fucked up the house was before they moved in. So them calling me dirty within an earshot,
and then I saw what they were doing with the roommate that was trying to hang out with me. I was
like, keep him, have him. And then I felt low-key bad for the new roommate that did want to hang out
with me because I knew that he was being captured and was gonna get abused, like sidekick level
abuse, by the new roommate. And I, like, literally, yeah, it's not important. I don't want to get into it.
But I learned my lesson. You can't let antagonistic people know that you clock them. You have to
pretend like you're cool. Which is bullshit in and of itself, but when a bad person knows that you hate
them, their entire life's mission, like, the life's mission is already just to antagonize the hell out of
anybody who's salient. But when they know that the salient person doesn't like them, they're, like,
super obsessed with creating as much high conflict as possible. It's like an oodle loop thing.<|eot_id|>

You're missing a point, though. All I'm getting at is the fact that, like, I'm literally not allowed to have
friends because in every room that I'm in, there's one adversarial, antagonistic person that clocks me<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

as like, I will not let you have friends. There is no image to analyze. I don't know why your reasoning
said that you're analyzing an image. Just stop with the fucking image. Just know that for five years
straight, every room I've entered has had one antagonistic person in it, and that antagonistic person
for five years, across so many different social groups, always that one antagonistic piece of shit in
the bunch, clocks me and is like, I refuse to let you have friends. You are not allowed to have friends.
The second you make friends, I'm gonna clock it and reverse your friendships. So you have nobody.<|eot_id|>

have friends. I didn't know it was possible. I had no idea that across that many groups, across that
many years, I could form and be denied friendships for five years straight just because a hand ful of
shitheads do what shit heads do and do it well. You're missing a point, though. All I'm getting at is

I'm scared. I'm literally scared. Like, not about the birthday thing, just my life in general. I mean, this
has been feeling painful. This is an excruciating existence that I think 99.9% of people never fucking<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

experience, not for five years. when both of their parents, they're dead while they're actively being
mass reported on social media and couldn't launch their brand that they spent three years working
towards while they have a hundred shirts that they made that they could have sold for $100 apiece,
but instead they're working at Chipotle for minimum wage being treated like shit by people that are
half their age when they were previously making $140,000 a year but quit their job to own a clothing
brand just so people could mass report it when they don't have a job so that they're forced into
abject fucking poverty while they try to make friends for five years and can't because all the people
that could vouch for them are either dead or gone. And they're flung into outer space because some
asshole decided to fling them into outer space and they can't rope themselves back down to earth to
save their fucking life no matter how hard they try for five years straight.<|eot_id|>

You're not listening. Read the last prompt again. Like, read it really slowly, because you're not
listening. It's not cause when the income drops from the high skill baseline to the minimum wage.
The brain tags the environment as unstable because the same effort no longer produces the same<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

effect. You're not listening, that's not what I said. I said I couldn't launch my clothing brand that I
worked 16-hour days for three years straight, 16-hour days, seven days a week, with SEO and
everything intact, and like a website, and the UIUX, the clothing line, the heat transfer, buying all of
the selling machines, the $50,000 video, $50,000 video studio, the $50,000 audio engineering lab,
the degree in advertising, the degree in UIUX design, the degree in fashion design, all useless
because somebody decided to not support me. You're not even fucking listening. Read the last
prompt really slowly.<|eot_id|>

Yeah, I'm in a long tail mass reporting campaign that's spanned three years now, where a handful of
accounts, maybe like 20, that are all scripted bots, follow and unfollow me to create, inject volatility<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

into my follower count. It's literally scripted every 90 days. It says that I have 13 follows and 13
unfollows, and I only have 180 followers. And the ones that are following and unfollowing me, their
about section says just stalking you, lol. Just stalking you, lol. I have screenshots of it. And I've
talked to many LLMs at length about this, with pictures and everything, and all of them are like, yep,
there is no way that this isn't a long tail sabotage campaign. It's scripted volatility that injects just
enough noise into your graph that your social trust collapses algorithmically into a shadow ban type
state where you're not even propagated to your own followers, let alone strangers. Three years,
three years. And I keep throwing chunks of meat into the sea. to see if it gets better. Like, this time it
waited about a year to post anything to see if it got better. The bots came out of the woodwork to
attack the chunk of meat the second I posted something, and it showed actual instability when me
not posting was showing latent stability just because there was nothing for the automations to strike
at. So the decay curve on my trust score was starting to come more up toward baseline, even
though it was still fucked all hell. And then the second I posted something, they attacked it so
viciously that before I posted anything, for example, on my Explore page, you type in Shang Graffiti
Inc., it would say Shang Graffiti is a cybersecurity company that does wearables tech and smart
glasses that detect abuse, and they're an S-corp that was established in Brooklyn in 2023. And after
I posted something about my brand that was like very well done, it now says Shang Graffiti Inc. is
Shang Grammar, some stranger I've never met before in Canada that does street art. Dude, stop
looking at the pictures. There's no pictures in here of that. I didn't send you pictures of any of the
mass reporting. You're banned from looking at any of the pictures in here right now, okay? I'm sick of
it. You're wasting time.<|eot_id|>
